commit.message:
feat: add average hourly danger chart, remove future day 6.3

- New chart: "ממוצע אזעקות לפי שעה — כל הימים" shows which hours
  are safest/most dangerous on average across all war days
- Safest hours highlighted in green with glow effect
- Removed March 6 (Friday) from WAR_DAYS and heatmap — it's a future date
- DAY_TO_DATE[5] already null, no data shown for unreached days

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: prioritise bait facts in query generator to prevent BVI data loss

Bait facts (is_true=false) were silently dropped by the 8-fact cap when
a client had more than 8 facts. Since facts are ordered by created_at ASC,
bait facts added later always ended up beyond index 7 and never got
validation queries generated — leaving BVI with no bait_triggered scores.

Now separates bait and real facts before slicing: bait facts always come
first, filling remaining slots with real facts up to max(8, bait.length).
Applied to both buildGenerationPrompt and buildCalibrationPrompt.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add placement confirmation, bigger hitboxes, disclaimer, and rename to erfindung

- Click-to-preview placement: first click shows semi-transparent building/road preview, second click confirms. Escape cancels.
- Larger invisible hit targets on edges (3.5x wider) and vertices (2x wider) for easier clicking.
- Added fan-project disclaimer on title screen (no affiliation with Catan GmbH).
- Renamed repo and package from catan to erfindung.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: pg_cron scheduled jobs + realtime booking counts (#124)

* feat: add pg_cron scheduled jobs and realtime booking counts

pg_cron jobs (requires pg_cron + pg_net extensions enabled in Supabase):
- auto_complete_events: hourly, completes stale published events via
  pg_net call to existing API route (preserves badge awarding logic)
- event_reminders: hourly, pure SQL inserts notification rows for
  tomorrow's events (Edge Function trigger handles push delivery)
- cleanup_stale_bookings: every 6h, cancels pending bookings with no
  payment proof after 48 hours

Realtime booking counts:
- New LiveBookingCount client component subscribes to Postgres Changes
  on the bookings table and re-fetches participant count via RPC
- Replaces static "X spots left" on event detail page with live updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(cron): use booked_at instead of created_at in stale booking cleanup

The bookings table uses booked_at, not created_at. This caused the
cron_cleanup_stale_bookings function to fail at runtime.

2) Tzeva Adom REST API (api.tzevaadom.co.il/alerts-history)

- Add check() / SecretStatus for HEAD /secrets/{key} and org-scoped variant;
  inspects metadata without consuming a read counter

- Remove NODE_AUTH_TOKEN secret reference entirely

refactor: integrate GAS health system, unify projectiles, add WeaponComponent

- Add ABaseShip: abstract APawn base (IAbilitySystemInterface + ASC + UShipAttributeSet)
  ASpaceshipPawn, AEnemyCharger, AEnemySniperShip all inherit ABaseShip
  TakeDamage() bridges all incoming damage through IncomingDamageEffectClass (GAS)
  OnHealthChanged() virtual hook updates each ship's health widget

- Add UShipAttributeSet: Health + MaxHealth attributes, clamped in PostGameplayEffectExecute

- Add ABaseProjectile: replaces ATurretProjectile + AEnemyProjectile (were identical)
  Applies damage via GAS (InstigatorASC + DamageEffectClass + SetByCaller Weapon.Damage)

- Add UWeaponComponent: self-contained firing component
  Used by UTurretComponent, UExternalTurretComponent, AEnemySniperShip
  Handles cooldown, projectile spawn, AdditionalIgnoreActors for self-collision

- Add BP_GE_ProjectileDamage: Instant GE, Health modifier SetByCaller Weapon.Damage

- Update Build.cs + uproject: enable GameplayAbilities plugin + deps

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(feat-035): 实现注意力节奏引擎

【实现内容】
1. 创建 attention_optimizer.py 核心模块：
   - AttentionRhythmOptimizer 类：注意力周期模型、页面类型节奏规则
   - 年级适配：低年级 2-3 页/周期、初中 3-4 页/周期、高中 4-5 页/周期
   - 页面类型分类：LECTURE/INTERACTIVE/PRACTICE/VISUAL/SUMMARY/HOOK
   - Engagement Hooks：趣味事实、你知道吗、挑战时刻、生活应用

2. 集成到 content_generator.py：
   - generate() 方法调用注意力优化器
   - analyze_rhythm() 分析页面序列节奏
   - optimize_sequence() 自动优化页面顺序

3. 增强提示词节奏编排指令：
   - CognitiveLoadMixin.get_attention_rhythm_constraints()
   - 年级差异化策略：低年级频繁切换、高年级深入但保持变化
   - 推荐页面序列模式：情境导入→新知→巩固→结尾

【验证结果】

feat: 残高検算の昇順/降順自動判定 — Web通帳の降順明細に対応

昇順・降順の両方向で検算し、ok数が多い方を自動採用する。
降順式: balance[i] = balance[i-1] - deposit[i-1] + withdrawal[i-1]
（前行の取引を巻き戻して古い側の残高を算出）

呼び出し側（DataTable, page.tsx）は変更不要（後方互換）。
テスト: 12件→20件（降順5件 + WithDirection 3件追加）、全33件通過。

fix: correct alert data — no launches before 10:00 on Feb 28, add verified data

CRITICAL FIX: Feb 28 had NO alerts before 10:00 AM Israel time.
Iran retaliated at ~08:00 GMT (10:00 IL), not at 01:24 as previously shown.

Sources: Xinhua timeline, FDD analysis, JPost, CNN, NPR, hamal.co.il, צבע אדום

- Feb 28: removed all fake pre-10:00 alerts, corrected to 3 verified barrages
- Mar 1: fixed Hezbollah first fire at 01:17 (confirmed ToI)
- Mar 2: corrected Hezbollah attack description (Mishmar HaCarmel)
- Mar 4: added 7 verified Iranian waves (FDD: 00:05-16:07) before hamal data
- Mar 5: replaced estimated data with verified צבע אדום alerts (06:21, 08:20, 08:27)

commit.message:
ci(runners): migrate lightweight workflows to ubuntu-slim (#885)

* ci(runners): migrate non-Claude workflows to ubuntu-slim

Migrate 4 lightweight workflows from ubuntu-latest (2-core VM) to
ubuntu-slim (1-CPU containerized runner). All complete in under
2 minutes and don't require heavy toolchains.

Migrated workflows:
- lint-context-commands.yml (Bash script validation)
- enforce-conventional-commits.yml (GitHub Script PR title fix)
- fix-release-conflicts.yml (gh CLI branch cleanup)
- validate-plugin-configs.yml (Python 3 config sync)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* ci(runners): migrate reusable Haiku workflows to ubuntu-slim

Migrate 7 reusable Claude Code (Haiku) workflows from ubuntu-latest
to ubuntu-slim. All use max 5-6 turns with expected runtime of 3-8
minutes, well within the 15-minute job timeout.

Each runs-on line includes a comment documenting the timeout constraint
and max-turns ceiling for callers.

Migrated workflows:
- reusable-security-secrets.yml (5 turns)
- reusable-quality-code-smell.yml (5 turns)
- reusable-quality-typescript.yml (5 turns)
- reusable-quality-async.yml (5 turns)
- reusable-a11y-aria.yml (5 turns)
- reusable-a11y-wcag.yml (6 turns)
- reusable-security-owasp.yml (6 turns)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Replace keyword triggers with intent-based skill descriptions

Keyword matching is fragile — users express uncertainty in infinite ways.
Now skill descriptions describe user STATE and INTENT:
- polymath: user lacks clarity, needs thinking partner before building
- product-manager: user has clear idea, needs formal requirements
- production-grade: user is ready to build, wants full pipeline

Removed regex hook patterns from polymath. Claude's natural language
understanding handles routing better than enumerated phrases.
